sections.heading: S
sections.section_value: The patient reports pain in the knee, particularly in the left knee, and difficulty with mobility. He reports swelling after an injury four days ago and a pop when he hurt it. The patient also reports pain in the right knee.

sections.heading: O
sections.section_value: Blood pressure is within normal limits. Heart rate is 78 beats per minute. Neurological exam is unremarkable. Palpation of the right knee reveals mild swelling.

sections.heading: A
sections.section_value: The patient's symptoms are consistent with a possible MCL tear and osteoarthritis. He has a history of knee pain.

sections.heading: P
sections.section_value: Order an MRI of the right knee. Order a straight leg brace. Prescribe ibuprofen 650mg every 6 hours as needed for pain. Schedule follow-up in 2 weeks to assess MRI results and adjust treatment plan.
